questions.question: Where were Peter and John going when they healed the lame man?
What did Peter say to the lame man before healing him?
options: Silver and gold I don't have, but what I have I give you
Rise and walk in God's name
Believe and you will be healed
questions.answer: Silver and gold I don't have, but what I have I give you

questions.question: The lame man had been crippled from birth.
Peter healed the man in the name of Jesus Christ of _____.
The healed man went into the temple with them, walking, leaping, and _____ God.
